With.Name: Main
With.Cte: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: ProjectionVariationPercentage --SUM(Overstock.ProjectionVariationPercentage) AS ProjectionVariationPercentage -Expression: ActualStock --SUM(Overstock.ActualStock) AS ActualStock -Expression: WarehouseStock --SUM(Overstock.WarehouseStock) AS WarehouseStock -Expression: Overstock12 --SUM(Overstock.Overstock12) AS Overstock12 -Expression: OverstockCost12 --SUM(Overstock.OverstockCost12) AS OverstockCost12 -Expression: Overstock28 --SUM(Overstock.Overstock28) AS Overstock28 -Expression: OverstockCost28 --SUM(Overstock.OverstockCost28) AS OverstockCost28 -Expression: Overstock53 --SUM(Overstock.Overstock53) AS Overstock53 -Expression: OverstockCost53 --SUM(Overstock.OverstockCost53) AS OverstockCost53 -Expression: PointOfSaleImminentPendingReceptions --SUM(Overstock.PointOfSaleImminentPendingReceptions) AS PointOfSaleImminentPendingReceptions -Expression: PointOfSalePendingReceptions --SUM(Overstock.PointOfSalePendingReceptions) AS PointOfSalePendingReceptions -Expression: WarehouseImminentPendingReceptions --SUM(Overstock.WarehouseImminentPendingReceptions) AS WarehouseImminentPendingReceptions -Expression: WarehousePendingReceptions --SUM(Overstock.WarehousePendingReceptions) AS WarehousePendingReceptions -Expression: PointsOfSaleWithStock --SUM(Overstock.PointsOfSaleWithStock) AS PointsOfSaleWithStock -Expression: PointsOfSaleInAssortment --SUM(Overstock.PointsOfSaleInAssortment) AS PointsOfSaleInAssortment -Expression: PointsOfSaleBlocked --SUM(Overstock.PointsOfSaleBlocked) AS PointsOfSaleBlocked -Expression: OriginalOrder --SUM(Overstock.OriginalOrder) AS OriginalOrder -Expression: Sales4WeeksAgo --SUM(Overstock.Sales4WeeksAgo) AS Sales4WeeksAgo -Expression: Sales3WeeksAgo --SUM(Overstock.Sales3WeeksAgo) AS Sales3WeeksAgo -Expression: Sales2WeeksAgo --SUM(Overstock.Sales2WeeksAgo) AS Sales2WeeksAgo -Expression: Sales1WeekAgo --SUM(Overstock.Sales1WeekAgo) AS Sales1WeekAgo -Expression: Stock4WeeksAgo --SUM(Overstock.Stock4WeeksAgo) AS Stock4WeeksAgo -Expression: Stock3WeeksAgo --SUM(Overstock.Stock3WeeksAgo) AS Stock3WeeksAgo -Expression: Stock2WeeksAgo --SUM(Overstock.Stock2WeeksAgo) AS Stock2WeeksAgo -Expression: Stock1WeekAgo --SUM(Overstock.Stock1WeekAgo) AS Stock1WeekAgo }} FROM Fact.Overstock {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: Overstock -On: ProductId-ProductId }} {{ GroupBy -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte }}
With.Query: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: ProjectionVariationPercentage --ProjectionVariationPercentage -Expression: ActualStock --ActualStock -Expression: WarehouseStock --WarehouseStock -Expression: Overstock12 --Overstock12 -Expression: OverstockCost12 --OverstockCost12 -Expression: Overstock28 --Overstock28 -Expression: OverstockCost28 --OverstockCost28 -Expression: Overstock53 --Overstock53 -Expression: OverstockCost53 --OverstockCost53 -Expression: PointOfSaleImminentPendingReceptions --PointOfSaleImminentPendingReceptions -Expression: PointOfSalePendingReceptions --PointOfSalePendingReceptions -Expression: WarehouseImminentPendingReceptions --WarehouseImminentPendingReceptions -Expression: WarehousePendingReceptions --WarehousePendingReceptions -Expression: PointsOfSaleWithStock --PointsOfSaleWithStock -Expression: PointsOfSaleInAssortment --PointsOfSaleInAssortment -Expression: PointsOfSaleBlocked --PointsOfSaleBlocked -Expression: OriginalOrder --OriginalOrder -Expression: Sales4WeeksAgo --Sales4WeeksAgo -Expression: Sales3WeeksAgo --Sales3WeeksAgo -Expression: Sales2WeeksAgo --Sales2WeeksAgo -Expression: Sales1WeekAgo --Sales1WeekAgo -Expression: Stock4WeeksAgo --Stock4WeeksAgo -Expression: Stock3WeeksAgo --Stock3WeeksAgo -Expression: Stock2WeeksAgo --Stock2WeeksAgo -Expression: Stock1WeekAgo --Stock1WeekAgo -Expression: ReductionDueToCapacity --ReductionDueToCapacity -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: ProjectionVariationPercentage ---SUM(ProjectionVariationPercentage) OVER() AS TotalProjectionVariationPercentage --Expression: ActualStock ---SUM(ActualStock) OVER() AS TotalActualStock --Expression: WarehouseStock ---SUM(WarehouseStock) OVER() AS TotalWarehouseStock --Expression: Overstock12 ---SUM(Overstock12) OVER() AS TotalOverstock12 --Expression: OverstockCost12 ---SUM(OverstockCost12) OVER() AS TotalOverstockCost12 --Expression: Overstock28 ---SUM(Overstock28) OVER() AS TotalOverstock28 --Expression: OverstockCost28 ---SUM(OverstockCost28) OVER() AS TotalOverstockCost28 --Expression: Overstock53 ---SUM(Overstock53) OVER() AS TotalOverstock53 --Expression: OverstockCost53 ---SUM(OverstockCost53) OVER() AS TotalOverstockCost53 --Expression: PointOfSaleImminentPendingReceptions ---SUM(PointOfSaleImminentPendingReceptions) OVER() AS TotalPointOfSaleImminentPendingReceptions --Expression: PointOfSalePendingReceptions ---SUM(PointOfSalePendingReceptions) OVER() AS TotalPointOfSalePendingReceptions --Expression: WarehouseImminentPendingReceptions ---SUM(WarehouseImminentPendingReceptions) OVER() AS TotalWarehouseImminentPendingReceptions --Expression: WarehousePendingReceptions ---SUM(WarehousePendingReceptions) OVER() AS TotalWarehousePendingReceptions --Expression: PointsOfSaleWithStock ---SUM(PointsOfSaleWithStock) OVER() AS TotalPointsOfSaleWithStock --Expression: PointsOfSaleInAssortment ---SUM(PointsOfSaleInAssortment) OVER() AS TotalPointsOfSaleInAssortment --Expression: PointsOfSaleBlocked ---SUM(PointsOfSaleBlocked) OVER() AS TotalPointsOfSaleBlocked --Expression: OriginalOrder ---SUM(OriginalOrder) OVER() AS TotalOriginalOrder --Expression: Sales4WeeksAgo ---SUM(Sales4WeeksAgo) OVER() AS TotalSales4WeeksAgo --Expression: Sales3WeeksAgo ---SUM(Sales3WeeksAgo) OVER() AS TotalSales3WeeksAgo --Expression: Sales2WeeksAgo ---SUM(Sales2WeeksAgo) OVER() AS TotalSales2WeeksAgo --Expression: Sales1WeekAgo ---SUM(Sales1WeekAgo) OVER() AS TotalSales1WeekAgo --Expression: Stock4WeeksAgo ---SUM(Stock4WeeksAgo) OVER() AS TotalStock4WeeksAgo --Expression: Stock3WeeksAgo ---SUM(Stock3WeeksAgo) OVER() AS TotalStock3WeeksAgo --Expression: Stock2WeeksAgo ---SUM(Stock2WeeksAgo) OVER() AS TotalStock2WeeksAgo --Expression: Stock1WeekAgo ---SUM(Stock1WeekAgo) OVER() AS TotalStock1WeekAgo }} FROM GroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: Products }} {{Pagination}}
